title: AmbientSounds
body: **Requires [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)** Adds a rich ambience to the minecraft world. It supports custom engines and works well with mods world gen mods. Use /cmdclientconfig to access the config menu. Use /ambient-debug to see which sounds are playing (especially provide this information if you run into any issues) [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers! [](https://www.patreon.com/creativemd)
